case_title: ELIZABETH JUAREZ VS. TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUAREZ, ELIZABETH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP DA SILVA, VIRGINIA P. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SILVA, TULIO C. , EACH INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF TULIOS SOUTHWESTERN GRILL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $3,666.47 PRINCIPAL, $20.96 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,912.43, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
